This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-57r2-h2wj-g887. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.20 fails to properly preserve untrusted labels for isolated cron awareness events, allowing webhook-triggered cron agent output to be recorded as trusted system events. Attackers can exploit this trust-labeling issue to strengthen prompt-injection attacks by rendering untrusted events as trusted System events.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m5j2-r859-r5cv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T15:29:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m5j2-r859-r5cv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m5j2-r859-r5cv"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T18:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T18:31:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-57r2-h2wj-g887", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44999", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/f61896b03cc7031f51106a04566831f4ac2a0bd7", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-improper-trust-labeling-in-isolated-cron-awareness-events", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m5j2-r859-r5cv"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Isolated cron awareness events were recorded as trusted system events", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T15:29:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m5j2-r859-r5cv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-18T15:29:40Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Isolated cron awareness events were recorded as trusted system events
